title: Cornelius ED-150 No Carbonation
summary: Check CO2 supply, regulator setting, and carbonator operation.

steps.title: Step 1: Check CO2 Supply
steps.text: Verify the CO2 tank is open, not empty, and the primary regulator is active.

steps.title: Step 2: Check Regulator Pressure
steps.text: Confirm the CO2 regulator is set to the correct operating pressure for the fountain system.

steps.title: Step 3: Check Carbonator Operation
steps.text: Listen for the carbonator pump. If the pump does not run, verify power, water supply, and control signal.

title: Water in CO2 Line
summary: Possible check valve failure or backflow issue in the carbonation system.

steps.title: Step 1: Shut Off CO2
steps.text: Turn off CO2 and safely depressurize the line before service.

steps.title: Step 2: Inspect Check Valve
steps.text: Check for failed or leaking check valves allowing water to backflow into the CO2 line.

steps.title: Step 3: Correct Backflow Issue
steps.text: Replace the failed check valve and purge the affected CO2 line before returning the system to service.
